All original content is the intellectual property of Charbel Daher. Where I have utilized third-party sources, research, or legal statutes, I have provided citations.

While you are welcome to read and cite my work, you are strictly prohibited from reproducing, adapting, or claiming any of my statements or original research as your own work.

If you would like to reference my work in your own writing, please provide proper attribution and a link back to this site.

THIS IS NOT LEGAL ADVICE.

As an aspiring law student, I blog to explore legal concepts and refine my skills. The information provided on this website is for educational purposes only and does not constitute legal advice. You should not rely on this information as a substitute for professional legal counsel.

The content on this site is provided “as is” for informational purposes. I am not a lawyer, and I am not liable for any actions taken based on the information provided here.
